guidance.wrapperRole: Dominican sun-grown wrapper delivers OpusX signature spice, sweetness, and the prestige of an estate-grown puro cover leaf.
guidance.binderRole: Dominican binder integrates the puro structure and supports Fuente's precise, celebration-grade construction.
guidance.fillerRole: Dominican filler provides cedar, baking spice, dried fruit, and layered complexity without outside tobacco.
guidance.bestFor: Collector, Fuente/OpusX fan, experienced smoker, celebration, cognac pairing, Dominican puro prestige.
guidance.avoidIf: Beginner, nicotine-sensitive, budget-sensitive, user needs easy daily availability or a short smoke window.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend when prestige, rarity, and a refined full-bodied Dominican puro are the goal—not blunt ligero shock.
